demographics.education: High school graduate, attending community college part-time

assessments.amps: Within functional range for most ADLs

currentSkills.communication: Fluent speech, difficulty with workplace social communication (small talk, asking for help, understanding sarcasm)
currentSkills.social: Has 1-2 close friends, difficulty initiating conversations, prefers structured social situations
currentSkills.adaptive: Fully independent with self-care, can use public transportation with visual supports, manages basic finances with support
currentSkills.vocational: Completed job shadowing, needs support with job interview skills, workplace social skills, and problem-solving

familyContext.livingArrangement: Lives at home with parents, goal is to move to supported apartment within 2 years
familyContext.parentGoals: Want her to be more independent
familyContext.therapyHours: 8 hours/week of ABA therapy focused on vocational and independent living skills
